org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.invoke.reflect.OperationMethod

Packages that use OperationMethod
Package
Description
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.common
Package that contains commons shared classes and interfaces.
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.config
Package that contains implementation of creating RouterFunctions from external configuration.
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.invoke.reflect
Reflection support for loading RouterFunctions from configuration.

    Constructor

    ReflectiveOperationInvoker(@Nullable Object target, OperationMethod operationMethod, ParameterValueMapper parameterValueMapper)
    Creates a new ReflectiveOperationInvoker that will invoke the given method on the given target.
     
    ReflectiveOperationInvoker(OperationMethod operationMethod, ParameterValueMapper parameterValueMapper)
    Creates a new ReflectiveOperationInvoker that will invoke the given static method.
